_comment: Source provenance for the Tanks-and-Temples Truck Gaussian-splat checkpoint. The convert pipeline verifies the on-disk source.ply SHA256 against expected_sha256 and refuses to run on mismatch. expected_sha256 must be filled in by the maintainer who first runs the conversion locally — published splat zoos do not commit to stable URLs over time. license_url is the original Tanks-and-Temples CC-BY 4.0 distribution; the pretrained splat (if used) inherits this license.
